title: Faktoriyel Hesaplama
subtitle: Recursive, iteratif ve math modulu ile.
code:
import math


def factorial_recursive(n):
    if n <= 1:
        return 1
    return n * factorial_recursive(n - 1)


def factorial_iterative(n):
    result = 1
    for i in range(2, n + 1):
        result *= i
    return result


print("Faktoriyel tablosu (0-10):")
for i in range(11):
    print(f"{i}! = {factorial_iterative(i)}")

print("\nRecursive 5! =", factorial_recursive(5))
print("Iteratif 5! =", factorial_iterative(5))
print("math.factorial(5) =", math.factorial(5))

# Kombinasyon hesaplama: C(n,r) = n! / (r! * (n-r)!)
n, r = 5, 2
combination = factorial_iterative(n) // (factorial_iterative(r) * factorial_iterative(n - r))
print(f"\nC({n},{r}) = {combination}")

# math.comb ile dogrulama
print(f"math.comb({n},{r}) = {math.comb(n, r)}")
